channel.title: Fahim Final News Feed
channel.description: Curated important news from multiple sources

item.title: Israel will escalate strikes against Hezbollah in Lebanon, Netanyahu says
item.description:
Matched Titles:
- Israel escalates strikes in Lebanon as Netanyahu vows to ‘crush’ Hezbollah
- Hezbollah reportedly hit Israel with more than 15 drone attacks on Tuesday
- Over 30 killed in Israeli attacks on Lebanon’s south, east — ministry
- Israeli strikes kill 31 in south Lebanon as Israel expands ground operations
- New strikes threaten ceasefires in Iran, Lebanon
- Israel’s military says it’s striking Hezbollah sites as Netanyahu vows to ‘increase the blows’
- Netanyahu Says Israel Plans to Intensify Attacks on Hezbollah in Lebanon
- Israeli strikes across southern Lebanon kill 31 people
- Aftermath of deadly Israeli strikes in southern Lebanon
- Israeli strikes kill 31 in south Lebanon as Israel expands ground operations
- Israel strikes near Lebanon’s Qaraoun dam as war intensifies: What to know
- Israeli forces clash with Hezbollah in south Lebanon as Netanyahu says troops seizing ‘strategic areas’
- Israeli strikes kill 31 in south Lebanon as Israel expands ground operations
- Israel pounds Lebanon with strikes, expands ground operations past security zone
- Israeli strikes kill 18 in Lebanon as bombardment intensifies in south
- Netanyahu says Israel is ‘deepening’ military operation in Lebanon
- Netanyahu says Israel expanding ground offensive in Lebanon despite ceasefire
- Lebanon latest: Netanyahu vows escalation against Hezbollah
- Israeli strike on village in eastern Lebanon kills 12, as Israel calls up more troops there
- Israel Steps Up Strikes in Lebanon as U.S. Pushes for Iran Peace Deal
- Israeli strikes hit multiple towns across southern Lebanon
- Israel steps up attacks on Hizbollah
- Israel-Hezbollah Clashes Intensify Along Lebanon’s Litani River; 12 Killed in Israeli Strike
- Israel unleashes wave of strikes in southern Lebanon
- Israeli ministers call for escalation and strikes on Beirut
- Eleven killed in Lebanon village as Israel intensifies strikes
- Israeli military says it strikes over 100 targets in Lebanon overnight
- Israeli strike on village in eastern Lebanon kills 12 as Israel calls up more troops
- Israel Steps Up Strikes in Lebanon as U.S. Pushes for Iran Peace Deal
- Israeli strike on village in eastern Lebanon kills 12, as more troops called up to Lebanon
- Netanyahu threatens to expand offensive in Lebanon as Washington signals support
- Netanyahu orders Israeli military to intensify Lebanon attacks
- Israeli strike on village in eastern Lebanon kills 12
- Israeli strike hits Kafr Sir as fighting escalates in south Lebanon
- Netanyahu vows to ‘smite’ Hezbollah with ‘overwhelming’ force
- Israel Intensifies Strikes on Lebanon as Evacuations Grow in Beirut Suburbs — Reports
- Netanyahu Orders Intensified Strikes Against Hezbollah Targets in Lebanon]]>
